column1: # Opsins (visual pigments) — a G-protein-coupled receptor family whose
# The tree sorts the sequences into the classic opsin classes rather than by
# species: the dim-light rhodopsins (RH1) form one clade across human/cow/
# chicken/fish, while the cone opsins split into RH2 (green), SWS1 (UV/violet/
# blue) and LWS (red/green) clades. Human green (MWS) and red (LWS) are a very
# recent duplication and come out nearly identical. Every member is a 7-
# transmembrane GPCR, which the InterProScan domain overlay (opsinDomainsGFF)
# marks across the body of each sequence.
